overall.description: First-person night hiking footage along a dirt trail through a forested area. The path is illuminated by a warm flashlight beam revealing trees on the right and open hillside on the left.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail using a flashlight to navigate the dark forest path

entered.detail: uneven dirt path with scattered rocks illuminated by the flashlight beam
tall trees lining the right side of the trail, visible as dark silhouettes against the sky
sloped terrain covered with tall grass and low vegetation on the left side
dark night sky visible in the gap between the tree canopy and the hillside

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt trail through a forest at night. The warm flashlight illuminates the rocky path ahead while trees line the right side and an open grassy hillside slopes upward on the left. The camera moves steadily forward through the quiet, dark natural environment with no other people or vehicles present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a secluded forest trail at night, maintaining a steady pace through a dark natural landscape. It begins with a warm flashlight beam cutting through the darkness to reveal a narrow, rocky dirt path. As the camera advances, the light illuminates a dense line of trees bordering the right side of the trail. The scene then opens to the left, where the flashlight catches the slope of an open grassy hillside rising upward into the night. The movement continues forward in silence, steadily traversing the quiet environment as the beam guides the way through the wilderness.
